title: Daily Memo: Iran Denies Negotiation Rumors
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
Denials. Iranian officials and the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps denied reports of negotiations with the United States on ending their war. Separately, Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian spoke by phone with Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and agreed on the importance of de-escalating the conflict through dialogue. The foreign ministers of Azerbaijan and Turkmenistan also spoke […]

The post Daily Memo: Iran Denies Negotiation Rumors appeared first on Geopolitical Futures.
full_text:
Denials. Iranian officials and the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps denied reports of negotiations with the United States on ending their war. Separately, Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian spoke by phone with Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and agreed on the importance of de-escalating the conflict through dialogue. The foreign ministers of Azerbaijan and Turkmenistan also spoke […]

Geopolitical Futures (GPF) was founded in 2015 by George Friedman, international strategist and author of The Storm Before the Calm and The Next 100 Years.
